title: Takara LA Taq Long PCR
description: Takara Bio TaKaRa LA Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL long-and-accurate 2-step reaction (worked example shown for a 17.5 kb target).

payload.notes: Vendor: Takara Bio, TaKaRa LA Taq DNA Polymerase (Cat. RR002M), for long and accurate amplification up to ~48 kb. The datasheet worked example (17.5 kb fragment) is a 2-step long-PCR protocol: 94 C/1 min initial denaturation, then 30 cycles of 98 C/10 sec denaturation and 68 C combined anneal/extend (15 min for 17.5 kb, about 1 min/kb), with a 72 C/10 min final extension. 25-35 cycles. Primers 0.2-1.0 uM. Note the higher dNTP (400 uM each) and Mg2+ (2.5 mM) than Ex Taq. The 1 min/kb extension shown is derived from the example, scale to your amplicon length. Source: https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/RR002M/RR002M_DS.v1312Da.pdf
